responses.finding: Image moderation is implemented in LocalModerationAdapter but not enforced in any content-application/rendering flow
responses.detail: Added image moderation for asset_import tool invocations in RequestAICreationHelpService._validate_tool_invocations(). When an asset_import invocation carries asset_bytes_base64 data, the base64 is decoded via Marshalls.base64_to_raw() and passed to ModerationPort.check_image() with the actor's age_band. Blocked assets are rejected before tool execution. This wires the check_image() code path into the AI orchestration flow.

summary: Image moderation is now wired into the AI orchestration pipeline via _validate_tool_invocations(). Asset import invocations carrying inline base64 image data are moderated through ModerationPort.check_image() before execution, enforcing the dual-filter pattern for both text and visual content.
